items.title: Saline Board to Review IFEC Application on Data Center Project
items.dek: Residents 30 minutes from Saline Township Hall face potential effects on local taxes and services from the IFEC Application listed as item 7 on the July 8 agenda. The agenda also includes Farmland Preservation and a Resolution on Public Participation Policy.
items.findings: Agenda item 7 is the IFEC Application | June and May agendas also scheduled Data Center items ahead of citizen comments
items.perspective: Tonight's meeting includes the IFEC application before public comment and board member comments.

items.title: Saline Twp Board Weighs IFEC Application for Data Center Project
items.dek: Residents 30 minutes away face direct effects on local tax base, water demand and farmland conversion if the exemption advances. The July 8 agenda lists an IFEC application as a standalone item. No dollar figures or abatement terms appear in the posted agenda.
items.source: Saline Township Board of Trustees agenda
items.findings: Agenda item 7 is listed as IFEC Application. Item 9 is listed as Data Center Update. No dollar figures or abatement terms appear in the posted agenda.
items.perspective: Tonight the board takes up the IFEC application under public comment rules before any vote; approval would set the tax-abatement path while the project remains tied to regional water and power infrastructure questions.

items.title: Delta County Planners Approve Year-Long Pause on Data Centers and Crypto Mining
items.dek: The Delta County Planning Commission voted July 7 to recommend a 12-month moratorium on new data center and cryptocurrency mining projects while officials develop zoning rules. The pause aims to give the rural Upper Peninsula county time to assess impacts on land use, power and water before any large-scale facilities advance.
items.judge_note: Planning commission vote to recommend 12-month moratorium is a concrete local decision with no matching live or killed items.
